title: <div>before i do anything else for you, I need you to do two things for me. 1) s
content:
before i do anything else for you, I need you to do two things for me. 1) show me your ID & 2) i need you to tell me what I mean to you

on one hand: i really like you. i like your hustle. i think you’re beautiful. you really get me going in a lot of ways. i hope we keep seeing each other. i hope something serious comes out of this.

on the other hand: i feel like a mark. you ask me for stuff, i deliver, and you move the goal posts.

i am not rich. i struggle with money. and oddly enough, i like spending it on people, but usually those people recipriocate

the balance here is way, way off, and if in you’re head you dont think it is, then we cant talk anymore. bc that is not something i can keep up with.

bc as of right now, this is the most time and money ive spent on not dating someone and not having sex with someone.
